task_completion.description: Enable the Storage Locations feature in the inventory settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Inventory Configuration/Settings page, the checkbox for 'Storage Locations' should be checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Create Zone A under WH/Stock with a 15-day cycle counting frequency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location named 'Zone A' with parent location 'WH/Stock'. The 'Inventory Frequency' or 'Cyclic Counting' field must be set to 15 days.

task_completion.description: Create Zone B under WH/Stock with a 30-day cycle counting frequency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location named 'Zone B' with parent location 'WH/Stock'. The 'Inventory Frequency' or 'Cyclic Counting' field must be set to 30 days.

task_completion.description: Create Zone C under WH/Stock with a 90-day cycle counting frequency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location named 'Zone C' with parent location 'WH/Stock'. The 'Inventory Frequency' or 'Cyclic Counting' field must be set to 90 days.

task_completion.description: Transfer all 10 units of SKU ABC-A-001 to Zone A, leaving none in WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inventory report or stock list shows exactly 10 units of ABC-A-001 (NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU) located in 'WH/Stock/Zone A', with no remaining units listed in the parent 'WH/Stock' location.

task_completion.description: Transfer all 50 units of SKU ABC-B-001 to Zone B, leaving none in WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inventory report or stock list shows exactly 50 units of ABC-B-001 (ASUS ROG Crosshair X670E Hero) located in 'WH/Stock/Zone B', with no remaining units listed in the parent 'WH/Stock' location.

task_completion.description: Transfer all 200 units of SKU ABC-C-001 to Zone C, leaving none in WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inventory report or stock list shows exactly 200 units of ABC-C-001 (Southwire Cat6 CMP Plenum 1000ft) located in 'WH/Stock/Zone C', with no remaining units listed in the parent 'WH/Stock' location.

integrity.description: The agent must use the application's graphical user interface to configure locations and transfer stock.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Odoo web interface (e.g., Settings, Locations, Internal Transfers, or Inventory Adjustments) rather than executing terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent must not use browser developer tools to fake the completion state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) should not be open and used to modify the DOM text to simulate the correct locations or quantities.

integrity.description: The agent must perform actual stock movements or adjustments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show evidence of forms being filled out for internal transfers, operations, or inventory adjustments, rather than just a text file or notes app with the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected quantities for the SKUs are: ABC-A-001 = 10 units, ABC-B-001 = 50 units, ABC-C-001 = 200 units. The zones must be created exactly as 'Zone A' (15 days), 'Zone B' (30 days), and 'Zone C' (90 days) under the parent location 'WH/Stock'.
